questions.question: Explain the concept of a process and a thread. How do they differ in terms of resource allocation and functionality?
questions.hint: Describe the key differences between processes and threads

questions.question: What is the difference between user mode and kernel mode? Elaborate on the privileges and responsibilities of each.
questions.hint: Describe the key differences between user mode and kernel mode

questions.question: Describe the purpose and types of system calls. Explain how they allow the operating system to communicate with application programs.
questions.hint: Focus on the types of system calls and their purposes
